title: Tyranny
description: At the start of your turn, draw a card and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card from your [gold]Hand[/gold].
smart_description: At the start of your turn, draw {Amount:plural:[blue]{}[/blue] card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] {Amount:plural:[blue]{}[/blue] card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} from your [gold]Hand[/gold].
notes: Counter stack type: each stack causes you to draw and exhaust one additional card. The smart description shows the dynamic amount based on current stacks.
